{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322041448442C15497737C0675D3B"}"},"total":3899},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7476037763520316222","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的洪荒流，很独特的视角，没有刻板的嗜血巫族，写出了巫族的重情重义，足够狗，但是我还是想知道，到底有几个女主。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740654725,"group_id":"7450046243746630718","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3nBZ4ZKizLw1ufRwdG0MWRj1OP+ayF5LUhUdabZrX9M","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0f7c3ed6c6e744ce920bd663b454f5d1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709707&x-signature=kDm9b2kvwbEMi6MJ9hvn0SttuAk%3D","user_id":"2773434738424009","user_name":"来自笔趣阁的认可"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2773434738424009","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7450046243746630718","book_info":{"abstract":"[洪荒+封神+西游]吴天穿越洪荒，成了巫族的一员；跟其他巫族不一样，吴天对打打杀杀不感兴趣，只想苟在祖巫们身后，偶尔给祖巫们出出主意，稳健修行、证得大道；巫妖大劫怕什么，只要能苟到地府开辟，我直接就去地府抱平心娘娘的大腿……
原本热血上头、只知蛮干的巫族，也越来越多的骚操作。
等到巫妖终战的时候，巫族竟然直接全体退出洪荒，留下妖族和圣人们对峙！
“坏了，巫族出了个点子王！”
